Product Overview
================

.. note::

   This page contains a visual diagram of the product interface including:

   - AC Output
   - DC Output
   - USB Ports
   - LCD Display
   - Power Button
   - Input Ports

   The detailed interface layout is provided as a visual diagram in the official manual.

   For the draft version of the documentation, this page is reserved as a placeholder.
   A full visual diagram will be inserted in the final publication stage.
